skills.name: Dark Gift

skills.name: Deceiver Trick

skills.description:
Throws a demonic bolt at an enemy, dealing. Consume all stacks of Demonic Charge to add as many additional demonic bolts.

During combat, generates a stack of Demonic Charge each time one of your summons deals damage, stacking up to.

skills.name: Infernal Plunge
skills.description: Jumps behind a target, dealing. If the target is afflicted by Chaos Mark, consumes it to reset the cooldown.

skills.name: Summon: Vile Imps

skills.name: Tear Reality
skills.description: A huge slash in a cone dealing 1% Strength Physical damage and reducing enemies Armor and MagicArmor for 15s.

skills.name: Void Fangs
skills.description: Spawns 2 void fangs that follow you. Recast the skill to throw a fang and deal to a target, applying Chaos Mark for 6s.

skills.description: Teleports a short distance.

runes.name: Echo Step

runes.name: Timewalking

runes.name: Phase Strike
runes.description: After using Blink, your next WeaponSkill deals 15% increased direct damage.

skills.name: Chrono Reset
skills.description: Fully regenerates your Spark and resets the cooldowns of all your WeaponSkills.

runes.name: Vitality Influx
runes.description: Chrono Reset fully heals you.

runes.name: Rekindle
runes.description: Triggering Conduits reduces the cooldown of Chrono Reset by 1s.

runes.name: Alignment
runes.description: Chrono Reset reduces the cooldowns of all your ClassSkills by 15s.

runes.description: The cooldown of Mystic Empowerment is reduced to 120s.

skills.name: Overload

runes.name: All-In

skills.name: Spark Shield
skills.description: Gain a Shield absorbing damage equal to 40% of your MaxHealth. Lasts 60s.

runes.name: Resurgence
runes.description: Gain 40 Spark when Spark Shield expires or is destroyed.

runes.name: Temporal Recoil
runes.description: While Spark Shield is active, Attacks against you slow the attacker for 3s.

runes.name: Runic Reinforcement
runes.description: Spark Shield increases your [Armor] by 200%.

skills.name: Static Nova
skills.description: Blast nearby enemies, dealing 90% Intellect Magic damage and immobilizing them for 4s.

runes.description: Enemies are slowed for 8s after the immobilizing effect of Static Nova stops.

runes.name: Aftershock
runes.description: Enemies are dealt 40% Intellect Magic damage after the immobilizing effect of Static Nova stops

runes.name: Chain Reaction
runes.description: Hitting 3 enemies or more with Static Nova triggers all your Conduits for free.

skills.name: Conduit: Lifebolt
skills.description:
Launches a lifebolt healing the nearest wounded ally .

Activates when you consume Spark above the gauge threshold.

skills.name: Conduit: Power
skills.description:
Increases your MagicMastery for 15s. Can stack up to times.

Activates when you consume Spark above the gauge threshold.

skills.name: Conduit: Shard
skills.description:
Fires 1 shard at your target dealing 25% Intellect Spark damage.

Activates when you consume Spark above the gauge threshold.

skills.name: Conduit: Spark Explosion
skills.description:
Explodes, dealing 25% Intellect Magic damage to nearby enemies.

Activates when you consume Spark above the gauge threshold.

skills.description: All your MagicDamage has a chance to make your next WeaponSkill or ComboAttack cost no Spark.

skills.name: Infusion
skills.description: You can choose a third Conduit.

skills.name: Sparkmaster
skills.description:
Using a WeaponSkill or your ComboAttack consumes Spark.

Consuming Spark activates your Conduits if your gauge is above the threshold.

You can select any combination of Conduits.

skills.description:
Channels a powerful beam dealing 100% Intellect Magic damage over 2s.

skills.description: Drops a smoke bomb at your feet that lasts 8s. Allies inside the cloud dodge all Attacks.

runes.name: Thick Cloud
runes.description: Duration of Smoke Bomb increased to 12s.

runes.name: Infused Smoke
runes.description: Smoke Bomb reduces all [Magic] damage suffered by 50%.

runes.name: Fortifying Particles
runes.description: Smoke Bomb increases MoveSpeedFactor by 50%.

skills.name: Smoke Bomb
skills.description: Dodges all Attacks.

skills.name: Urge to Kill
skills.description: Finisher has no cooldown and you generate 1 ComboPoint every 1s for 10s.

runes.name: Ramp-up
runes.description: Each consecutive Finisher increases the damage on the next one by 10%.

runes.name: Chronic Urge
runes.description: The cooldown of Urge to Kill is reduced to 120s.

runes.name: Urge to Slaughter
runes.description: Participating in killing an enemy extends the duration of Urge to Kill by 1s.

skills.name: Combo Master
skills.description: You can now stack up to 5 ComboPoint.

skills.name: Combo Points
skills.description: Generates 1 ComboPoint when using a ComboAttack or WeaponSkill different from the last action.

skills.name: Finisher
skills.description:
Consumes all ComboPoints to dash forward, dealing 100% Dexterity Physical damage and knocking enemies back.
Damage increased by 30% per ComboPoint consumed.

runes.name: Finality
runes.description: Generates an additionnal ComboPoint when you critically strike while generating a ComboPoint.

runes.name: Combo Ruler
runes.description: You can now stack up to 6 ComboPoint.

runes.name: Killing Spree
runes.description: After you use Finisher, you generate 1 ComboPoint.

skills.name: Acidic Splatter
skills.description: Finisher has a 0.05 chance per ComboPoint to spread acid to enemies, poisoning them for 50% Intellect Magic damage over 8s while reducing their MagicArmor .

skills.name: Adrenaline
skills.description: Your MoveSpeedFactor is increased by as long as an enemy is affected by Lethal Poison.

skills.name: Atrophic Poison
skills.description: Lethal Poison reduces all damage dealt by affected enemies by 1% per stack.

skills.name: Bullying the Weak
skills.description: Damage dealt to poisoned enemies increased by 3%.

skills.name: Cheat Death
skills.description: Damage that should kill you leaves you at 5% of your MaxHealth. For 3s, you take reduced damage. ( cooldown).

skills.name: Crippling Poison
skills.description: The first time Lethal Poison reaches the maximum number of stacks on an enemy, it stuns them for 5s.

skills.name: Deadly Poison
skills.description: Lethal Poison has a 0.01 chance per stack to critically strike.

skills.name: Envenom
skills.description: Your ComboAttack always applies Lethal Poison with a 0.35 chance to also apply it to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Finish the Job
skills.description: Your Attacks have an additional 0.07 chance to critically strike poisoned enemies.

skills.name: Footwork
skills.description: DodgeChance increased .

skills.name: Improved Mixture
skills.description: Lethal Poison now stacks up to 6 times.

skills.name: Intent to Kill
skills.description: Gain 1 ComboPoint when an enemy affected by your Lethal Poison dies.

skills.name: Leeching Poison
skills.description: Lethal Poison heals you for 20% of the damage dealt.

skills.name: Lethal Dose
skills.description: Damage dealt by your poisons increased by 10%.

skills.name: Lethal Poison
skills.description: Your Attacks have a 0.15 chance to apply a stack of Lethal Poison, poisoning them for 18% Dexterity Magic damage over 8s, stacking up to.

skills.name: Noxious Stratagem
skills.description: Lethal Poison damage has a 0.07 chance to reduce the cooldown of your WeaponSkills by 0.5s.

skills.name: Opportunity Strike
skills.description: Your BasicAttacks applying Lethal Poison have a 0.5 chance to strike again.

skills.name: Regenerating Miasmas
skills.description: Heals you for 1% of your MaxHealth when an enemy affected by your Lethal Poison dies.

skills.name: Up the Ante
skills.description: CooldownReduction increased .

skills.name: Venom Infusion
skills.description: Your WeaponSkills have a 0.2 chance to apply Lethal Poison.

skills.name: Venomous Finisher
skills.description: Finisher always applied Lethal Poison and deals 5% increased damage for each stack.

skills.name: Virulent Magic
skills.description: Excess applications of Lethal Poison will deal 20% Intellect Magic damage.

skills.name: Bloodrage Aura
skills.description: Increases the CritChance of all allies within 40 by 3%.

skills.name: Sharpen Fangs
skills.description: Your Attacks and Weapon skills have a 0.2 to cause the enemies to bleed for 25% Dexterity Physical damage over 9s, stacking up to times.

skills.name: Tide Warlord
skills.description: Your PhysicalMastery is increased by while fighting under 50% Health.

skills.name: Zeal
skills.description:
Your Attacks and WeaponSkills generate a stack of Zeal, stacking up to times.

At stacks, your next ComboAttack consums all stacks to reset the cooldown of Zealous Spins and increase its damage by 50%.

skills.name: Abyssal Fury
skills.description:
Imbues your weapons with tide power for 8s, giving all your Attacks a 0.3 chance to blast 15% Strength Physical damage.
Blasted damage is considered as an Attack.

skills.name: Bonethrow
skills.description: Throws a sharpen bone at an enemy, dealing 65% Strength Physical damage and causing them to bleed for 40% of the damage dealt over 8s. The bone then jumps to 2 enemies.

skills.name: Gaping Wound
skills.description: Mutilates an enemy, dealing 100% Dexterity Physical damage and opening a gaping wound, causing them to bleed for 400% Dexterity Raw damage over 8s.

skills.name: Groundswell Strike
skills.description:
Deals 48% Strength Physical damage to nearby enemies.
All your Attacks reduce the cooldown by 1.5s.

skills.name: Iron Cyclone
skills.description: Charges straight ahead, dealing four times 35% Strength Physical damage to enemies and stunning them for 1s.

skills.name: Shadow Jump
skills.description: Teleports yourself behind the target, dealing 120% Dexterity Physical damage and stunning them for 1s.

skills.name: Shiv
skills.description:
Deals 30% Dexterity Physical damage 2 times to nearby enemies.

Your ComboAttack resets the cooldown.

skills.name: Shiv
skills.description: Stabs and deals 60% Dexterity Physical damage to an enemy, triggering the effects of Sharpen Fangs.

skills.name: Zealous Spins
skills.description: Spins foward, dealing 8% Strength Physical damage to enemies thrice on your path. If an enemy is hit, you can recast it within 3s.

skills.name: Battle Shout
skills.description: Grants CritChance to allies within 100 for 15s.

runes.name: Battle Fury
runes.description: Your critical strikes extend the duration of your own Battle Shout by 0.25s.

runes.name: Melee Fever
runes.description: Participating in killing an enemy reduces the cooldown of Battle Shout by 3s.

runes.name: Mocking Shout
runes.description: Battle Shout forces all nearby enemies to attack you and increases your Armor .

skills.name: Berserk
skills.description: Increase all damage done by 100% and Rage generated from Skills and Attacks by 1 for 15s.

runes.name: Releasing the Beast
runes.description: The cooldown of Berserk is reduced to 120s.

runes.name: Fortitude
runes.description: While Berserk is active, taking any damage heals you for 2% of your MaxHealth.

runes.name: Flood of Anger
runes.description: Raging Smash extends the duration of Berserk by 1s.

skills.name: Burst of Anger
skills.description: Your 3 next WeaponSkills have no cooldown. Lasts 20s.

runes.name: Overwhelming Rage
runes.description: Burst of Anger instantly fills your Rage gauge to maximum.

runes.name: Into The Fray
runes.description: Burst of Anger increases the chance for your WeaponSkills to critically strike by 1% for each enemy within 10.

runes.name: Cycle of Hatred
runes.description: The cooldown of Burst of Anger is reduced to.

skills.name: Charge
skills.description: Charges forward, dealing 120% Strength Physical damage to enemies hit and stunning them for 1s.

runes.name: Double Up
runes.description: Charge has charges.

runes.name: Destabilisation
runes.description: Charge reduces all damage dealt by foes for 10s.

runes.name: Juggernaut
runes.description: Charge generates 5 Rage.

skills.name: Ignore Pain
skills.description: Reduces all damage taken for 12s.

runes.name: Hold On!
runes.description: Ignore Pain affects allies within 40 for half of the effect.

runes.name: Last Stand
runes.description: Ignore Pain instantly heals for 35% of your MaxHealth.

runes.name: Enduring Defenses
runes.description: Blocking reduces the cooldown of Ignore Pain by 1s.

skills.name: Surging Force
skills.description: Sends a shockwave in a frontal cone, dealing 60% Vitality Physical damage and stunning all enemies for 2s.

runes.name: Battle Momentum
runes.description: Hitting 3 or more enemies with Surging Force reduces its cooldown by 15s.

runes.name: Fury Pulse
runes.description: Surging Force generates 1 Rage for each enemy hit.

runes.name: Concentrated Impact
runes.description: Surging Force deals 40% increased damage if only one enemy is hit.

skills.name: Infinite Rage
skills.description: While in combat, you generate 1 Rage every 3s.

skills.name: Rage
skills.description:
Generates 1 Rage from Attacks and WeaponSkills.
You can spend Rage to use Raging Smash.

skills.name: Raging Smash
skills.description: Strikes the ground with rage, dealing 160% Strength Physical damage to nearby enemies and knocking them back.

runes.name: Thundersmash
runes.description: Raging Smash slows the enemies for 3s.

runes.name: Scent of Battle
runes.description: Raging Smash costs 1 less Rage.

runes.name: Execution
runes.description: Raging Smash deals 25% increased damage to enemies under 35% Health.

skills.name: Bloodfeast
skills.description: Hemorrhage heals you for 30% of the damage dealt.

skills.name: Bloodletting
skills.description: Damage dealt by your bleeding effects increased by 10%.

skills.name: Bruise
skills.description: Your Physical critical strikes increase all Physical damage suffered by enemies by 4% for 15s.

skills.name: Cracking Blood
skills.description: Damage from Hemorrhage has a 0.35 chance to deal an additional 15% Faith Magic damage.

skills.name: Crippling Bloodloss
skills.description: Hemorrhage reduces all damage dealt by affected enemies by 5%.

skills.name: Exposed Essence
skills.description: You ignore 5% of bleeding enemies' MagicArmor and Armor.

skills.name: Exsanguination
skills.description: Hemorrhage has a 0.1 chance to critically strike.

skills.name: Fighting Spirit
skills.description: CritChance increased .

skills.name: Hemorrhage
skills.description: Your Physical CriticalStrikes make the enemies bleed for 40% of the damage dealt over 9s.

skills.name: Hold the Line
skills.description: Damage dealt increased by 3% and damage suffered reduced by 3% while Rage Shield is active.

skills.name: Infused Wound
skills.description:
Your Magic critical strikes apply a sparked version of Hemorrhage for 35% of the damage dealt over 9s.

Benefits from all Hemorrhage-related Talents.

skills.name: Magic Conduction
skills.description: Damage dealt to enemies affected by Hemorrhage increased by 7%.

skills.name: Master-at-arms
skills.description: Your Attacks deal 15% increased critical damage.

skills.name: Rage Shield
skills.description: When you apply Hemorrhage, you gain a Shield absorbing an amount equal to 5% of your MaxHealth for 8s.

skills.name: Red Tempo
skills.description: Damage from bleeding effects have a 0.12 chance to reduce the cooldown of all your WeaponSkills by 1s.

skills.name: Seasoned Soldier
skills.description: Your Physical critical strikes grant 1 Rage.

skills.name: Second Wind
skills.description: Damage that should kill you leaves you at 1 Health and grants you the effects of Rage Shield (120s cooldown).

skills.name: Sever
skills.description: Your WeaponSkills deal 20% increased critical damage.

skills.name: Shattered Rage
skills.description: When Rage Shield is destroyed, you deal 20% Vitality Physical damage to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Surge of Violence
skills.description: Your ComboAttack has a 0.25 chance to allow your next Raging Smash to critically strike and cost no Rage.

skills.name: Zealous Warrior
skills.description: Fervor increased .

skills.name: Domination
skills.description: You deal 15% increased damage to enemies affected by crowd control effects.

skills.name: Hysteria
skills.description:
Each time you deal non-periodic Physical damage to an enemy, you gain a stack of Hysteria.
At 150 stacks, you can release your anger.

skills.name: Outburst
skills.description: Grants MoveSpeedFactor and PhysicalMastery to allies within 40 for 6s.

skills.name: Rampage
skills.description: Charges your strike up to 3s, then violently smashes the ground, dealing between 250% Strength Physical damage and to nearby enemies and knocking them back depending on charge time.

skills.name: Shockwave
skills.description: Heavily slams in a frontal cone, dealing 180% Strength Physical damage and stunning enemies for 3s.

skills.name: Wild Whirlwind
skills.description:
Spins around for 3s, dealing 35% Strength Physical damage every 0.25s. The last hit knocks enemies back.
You can move freely during the channeling.
